description: A vulnerability was found in Tenda AC7 15.03.06.44. The affected element is an unknown function of the file /goform/WifiMacFilterSet. Performing a manipulation of the argument wifi_chkHz results in stack-based buffer overflow. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used.
